overview: A pixel-perfect clone of TradeFXBook — a modern Forex Trading Journal SaaS landing page with dark/light mode toggle, animated stats, glassmorphism card design, pricing tiers, FAQ accordion, and a full contact form.
features: Dark/light mode toggle with smooth transitions
Glassmorphism feature cards with hover glow effects
Dashboard preview with mock PnL and sparkline
Fully responsive design with Inter font and neon green accents
